Option.Description: Spaceship API key (overrides SPACESHIP_API_KEY env var)
Spaceship API secret (overrides SPACESHIP_API_SECRET env var)
Output format: yaml, json, or table
Disable colored output
Sort by: name, unicodeName, registrationDate, expirationDate

Number of items to return (1-100)
